text:
The main objective of this research was to know how children in PAUD (Play School) acquire language in the environment which is provided text rich environment. Using qualitative case study method, the author looked at all possible information how children can acquire language in PAUD. The researcher collected the data in the form of observations, interviews and document collection. The results showed that the provision of text rich environment could be implement and the children showed very great interest in the book provided and very active in responding the words they found on the walls and materials laid out. The effects shown by the children after being put in the PAUD Shafa Marwah environment were very remarkable and showed great improvement in terms of knowing the word meanings, increasing the understanding in reading and also to the children’s ability to speak in which they improve their vocabulary and language abilities in communicating.

Keywords: Text-rich environment; language development; early childhood education
